contract_summary: Get-wrapper that acquires a reference on the DMA-capable parent device node. First attempts to get the parent via the 'interconnects' property with 'dma-mem' name; on failure falls back to the direct parent via of_get_parent. The returned node's reference count is incremented; caller must release with of_node_put. May return NULL if no parent exists; caller must check and handle NULL.
